oad Home Other Ptolemy Project Software Other Software home HyVisual Diva Ptolemy Classic Ptolemy II Ptplot Tycho Vergil Viptos VisualSense Other Java Packages Skip to sidebar oct2moml Oct2moml is a start at a tool that converts Ptolemy Classic Octt

start at a tool that converts Ptolemy Classic Octtools Facets to Ptolemy II MoML files. This tool is incomplete and totally unsupported, but it is useful for getting a start on converting Ptolemy Classic Octtools facets to MoML Files The oct2moml hom

sic Octtools facets to MoML Files The oct2moml home page is at http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/other/oct2moml.htm oct2moml is heavily based on oct2ptcl, which was written by Kennard White. Christopher Hylands developed oct2moml. Questions about oc

er Hylands developed oct2moml. Questions about oct2monl should be posted to the ptolemy-hackers mailing list, or to the comp.soft-sys.ptolemy newsgroup. Limitations oct2moml is a hack . Don't use it if you are not comfortable with recompiling Ptol

t if you are not comfortable with recompiling Ptolemy Classic. oct2moml only translates the logical connections of a facet, it does not translate how the icons look, or where they are positioned. Galaxies are not handled well There is not necessarily

xies are not handled well There is not necessarily a one-to-one translation between Ptolemy Classic Star names and their parameters and Ptolemy II Actor names and their parameters oct2moml is based on oct2ptcl, so it has the following oct2ptcl bugs:

oct2ptcl, so it has the following oct2ptcl bugs: oct2ptcl is too picky about some facets. It thinks facets are corrupt, but the facet will work fine in Ptolemy. oct2ptcl is technically correct here, but by not processing semi-corrupt facets, oc

re, but by not processing semi-corrupt facets, oct2ptcl is not very useful oct2ptcl has not been extended to handle initializable delays. The mdsdf:test:IIRusingFIR demo uses initializable delays. If we run oct2ptcl on this facet, we get: connect

If we run oct2ptcl on this facet, we get: connect Fork.output=21 output#2 FIR1 input However, if we compile this facet with ptolemy, we get: connect Fork.output=21 output#2 FIR1 input "0 1" Installation Download the Ptolemy Classic src and other.src

on Download the Ptolemy Classic src and other.src tar files Build Octtools: cd $PTOLEMY ./MAKEARCH make install_octtools Download oct2moml-0.01.tar.gz from http://ptolemy.eecs.berkeley.edu/other/oct2moml-0.01.tar.gz and untar it cd $PTOLEMY tar -zxf

oml-0.01.tar.gz and untar it cd $PTOLEMY tar -zxf oct2moml-0.01.tar.gz Build oct2moml. Currently, MAKEARCH does not build a separate obj.$PTARCH directory for oct2moml, so you will need to build the source files in the src/ directory: cd $PTOLEMY/sr

source files in the src/ directory: cd $PTOLEMY/src/octtools/tkoct/top make cd ../oct2moml make To test oct2moml, run oct2moml -g $PTOLEMY/src/domains/sdf/demo/butterfly Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
